core_mechanism: ground-state substitution (factorization of a quadratic energy form around a known positive ground-state solution) that rewrites the form as a manifestly nonnegative weighted quadratic form to extract a sharp, optimal-constant coercive lower bound, applied recursively to raise the order
brief_reason: The abstract establishes the sharp constant by combining a ground state representation formula with a weighted integrated Bochner identity in an iterative scheme, which is exactly the factorization-around-a-positive-ground-state technique for deriving optimal coercivity lower bounds.
